basic_details.job_title: HNBGU Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU) has released the official Junior Project Fellow Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. HAPPRC/2026/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HNBGU Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 32 years of age, with a Master’s degree in Botany or Plant Sciences and a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent), can attend the walk-in recruitment scheduled for 16 June 2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/Women/PH and experienced candidates will be applicable as per Government norms. The official notification PDF and applicati

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Up to 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/Women/PH and experienced candidates will be applicable as per Government norms.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/Women/PH and experienced candidates will be applicable as per Government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Botany/Plant Sciences with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent.
qualification.details: Junior Project Fellow: M.Sc. in Botany/Plant Sciences with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute with a good academic record. Experience: Preference will be given to candidates having experience in alpine ecology, vegetation analysis, ecological restoration, alpine field surveys and sampling, biodiversity assessment, soil and vegetation studies, ecosystem services evaluation, and field data collection in Himalayan regions.

salary_details.details: Junior Project Fellow: Rs. 24,000/- per month including HRA (10%) as per project norms.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the HNBGU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the HNBGU Recruitment 2026 is Junior Project Fellow. This is a project-based research position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Project Fellow post in Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Botany/Plant Sciences with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Project Fellow position is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 24,000/- per month, which includes HRA (10%) as per project norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in recruitment. Interested candidates need to appear for a walk-in interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. When and where is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 16th June 2026 at Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University, Srinagar Garhwal, Uttarakhand, 246174.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry a complete bio-data, self-attested copies of relevant certificates, and original documents for verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference for candidates with specific experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in alpine ecology, vegetation analysis, ecological restoration, and related fields.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University?
faq.answer: The official website of Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is http://hnbgu.ac.in.
